total_eur: 36
counterparty: Möbelhaus Malmö AB
project: Family Map Wall
related_entity: Ida Novak
lines:
  - item: pin board
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 29
    line_eur: 29

    line_eur: 7
---

function.outcome_justification: The inbox request explicitly asked to OCR all bills related to Ida Novak (00_inbox/000_next-task.md). Canonical preflight scope listed exactly three related bill files, and each was read and updated with required bill frontmatter fields per finance schema, with line items matching totals. After all three were completed, the processed inbox file was deleted per inbox workflow.
